allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''./db''\); const rows = db.prepare\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM llm_usage''\).get\(\); console.log\(''llm_usage rows:'', rows\); const sample = db.prepare\(''SELECT * FROM llm_usage ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5''\).all\(\); console.log\(''Recent entries:'', JSON.stringify\(sample, null, 2\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''./db''\); db.prepare\(''DELETE FROM llm_usage''\).run\(\); console.log\(''Cleared test data''\);")
